metadata.title: The Mission
metadata.description: Property Dreamz is on a mission to make buying real estate in Mexico safe, transparent, and accessible for international buyers. Learn who we are and why we built this.
metadata.ogDescription: Safe, transparent, and accessible Mexican real estate for international buyers.

hero.heading: Your trusted partner for real estate in Mexico.
hero.paragraph1: Property Dreamz® connects international buyers with verified real estate opportunities across Mexico.
hero.paragraph2: We make the process transparent, simple, and secure so you can invest with confidence.
hero.location: Based in San Diego, serving all of Mexico.

whyDifferent.heading: Buying in another country should feel exciting, not risky.
whyDifferent.body: Many buyers face challenges understanding legal requirements, verifying developers, and comparing real opportunities. Property Dreamz® was created to simplify that journey by providing a trusted platform focused on transparency, verification, and buyer confidence.

steps.title: Discover
steps.body: Explore verified developments in the best locations.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: We review each project to ensure it meets our standards.

steps.title: Compare
steps.body: Easily compare options, prices, amenities and locations.

steps.title: Invest
steps.body: Connect directly with developers and move forward.

steps.title: Enjoy Mexico
steps.body: Live, vacation or invest in the lifestyle you deserve.

cards.title: Verified Developments
cards.body: Every listing goes through a review process before being featured on our platform.

cards.title: Buyer-Focused Platform
cards.body: Built specifically for international buyers with clear information and local expertise.

cards.title: Direct Developer Access
cards.body: Connect directly with qualified developers. No middlemen, no confusion.
cards.alt: Aerial view of a residential development

cards.title: Trusted Information
cards.body: Clear details, transparent documentation, and reliable guidance at every step.

certification.heading: Raising the standard of real estate in Mexico.
certification.paragraph1: Property Dreamz® works alongside the CMRE® certification framework to promote transparency and higher standards within Mexico's real estate market.
certification.paragraph2: Buyers can easily identify developments that have completed independent verification processes.
certification.logoAlt: CMRE — Certified Mexico Real Estate seal

mission.heading: Making real estate in Mexico easier to understand, safer to explore, and more accessible to international buyers.

values.title: Transparency
values.body: We believe in clear information and open communication.

values.title: Trust
values.body: We verify, we review, and we stand behind what we promote.

values.title: Opportunity
values.body: We connect buyers with incredible places and real possibilities.

cta.heading: Ready to explore Mexico's verified developments?
cta.imageAlt: Sunset over the Baja California coastline
